description: A simple designed card on a plain white background reproducing a Donald Trump social-media post. Standard layout: circular avatar at top-left showing a stylized American-flag-painted face, bold name 'Donald J. Trump' with a magenta verification badge and black subscription badge, and the handle '@realDonaldTrump' beneath. The body text in black sans-serif reads: 'The Dow Jones Industrial Average just hit 50,000 for the first time in History. CONGRATULATIONS AMERICA!' This is a celebratory economic-boosterism graphic crediting the administration with a record stock-market milestone. The tweet caption reads 'Trust in Trump. [money-with-wings emoji]'. The propaganda technique is triumphalist self-congratulation tying market gains to the President; target audience is supporters and investors.
notable_text: The Dow Jones Industrial Average just hit 50,000 for the first time in History. CONGRATULATIONS AMERICA! / (caption) Trust in Trump.
